properties.name: awareness
properties.definition: Stakeholder is aware that a category of solutions exists.

properties.name: acquisition
properties.definition: Stakeholder is evaluating specific offerings in the category.

properties.name: activation
properties.definition: Stakeholder has chosen an offering and is onboarding or setting it up.

properties.name: retention
properties.definition: Stakeholder continues using the offering past initial activation.

properties.name: referral
properties.definition: Stakeholder recommends the offering to others.
